Welcome.title: Warhammer 40,000: Brigandyne
Welcome.lead: Welcome to the grim darkness of the far future. There is only war. This system adapts Brigandyne 2nd edition to the merciless universe of Warhammer 40,000: d100 under skill, six degrees of success, Fate, Warp Psykers and True Faith.

feature.dice: Automated d100 rolls: degrees, Advantages/Disadvantages, opposed rolls and Fate.
feature.chargen: Guided character creation: Imperium species, Adepta and skill rolling.
feature.content: Bundled compendiums: weapons, armour, careers, talents, psychic powers, bestiary, vehicles…
feature.warp: The Warp is watching: Psychic Phenomena, Perils of the Warp, Corruption and True Faith handled automatically.

Welcome.dontShow: Don't show again for this version

showWelcome.name: Show welcome screen
showWelcome.hint: Shows the Warhammer 40,000: Brigandyne welcome screen on world launch, once per new version.
